holdings.infoBox: ESML is an equity ETF with a total of 916 individual holdings. The top holdings are Sandisk stock at 4.42%, BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY at 0.57%, US Foods Holding at 0.50%, Assurant at 0.45%, and nVent Electric at 0.42%.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA Small-Cap ETF (ESML) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap companies with high environmental, social, and governance factor scores as determined by MSCI. ESML was launched on Apr 10, 2018 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: MSCI USA Small Cap Extended ESG Focus Index
